{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Simon's gifts
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon's gifts]] are currently weaker than usual and not at full strength.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12">''House of Blades'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
